A

addSlot(String, String) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentService
Adds a future slot when the date/time input is valid and unique.
addSlot(LocalDate, LocalTime) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentService
Adds a future slot when the values are valid and unique.
addSlot(AppointmentSlot) - Method in interface org.example.repository.AppointmentRepository
Adds a slot when it is valid and not duplicated.
addSlot(AppointmentSlot) - Method in class org.example.repository.InMemoryAppointmentRepository
Adds a slot when it is valid and unique by date-time.
ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class org.example.domain.UserRole

Handles user and admin login checks.

authenticate(String, String) - Method in class org.example.service.AdminAuthService
Checks credentials and returns true when login is successful.
authenticateWithPolicy(Credentials) - Method in class org.example.service.AdminAuthService
Checks credentials with lockout policy and returns detailed result data.
authenticateWithStatus(String, String) - Method in class org.example.service.AdminAuthService
Checks email and password and returns a login status value.
authenticateWithStatus(Credentials) - Method in class org.example.service.AdminAuthService
Checks credentials and returns a login status value.
AuthenticationAttemptResult - Class in org.example.service
Represents the outcome of one authentication attempt.

Writes login and logout events to the console.
